_meta.description: Cross-artifact synthesis phase. Consumes store_profile, market_intelligence, brand_positioning, and competitor_clusters to produce a strategy_synthesis artifact that is the primary strategic input for all downstream planning phases (offer-architecture, content-strategy, gtm-plan).

required_subfields: array with at least 1 cluster having cluster_name and cluster_role

synthesis_scope.description: This phase synthesizes all four upstream planning artifacts into a single strategic view. The LLM is given structured summaries of all four artifacts and asked to draw cross-cutting strategic conclusions.
synthesis_scope.evidence_boundary: LLM inference from internal signals only. No external research, no crawling, no competitive intelligence APIs. All outputs are planning hypotheses requiring human review.
cross_signal_examples: An opportunity in market_intelligence + a matching gap in competitor_clusters → high-priority opportunity
A positioning angle in brand_positioning contradicted by a strong competitor cluster → risk
An unknown_state carried through market_intelligence → surfaces in strategy_synthesis.unknown_states

strategy_synthesis.description: Strategic synthesis artifact. Written to {project_root}/{project_id}/strategy-synthesis.json (self-hosted) or returned inline (cloud).

field_derivation_notes.strategic_summary: LLM-synthesized 2-4 sentence overview. Draws on store vertical, market category, brand_role, and competitive landscape.
field_derivation_notes.growth_thesis: LLM-synthesized. Draws primarily on market positioning_goals, brand_positioning.differentiators, and gaps in competitor_clusters.
field_derivation_notes.positioning_focus: LLM-synthesized. Primarily from brand_positioning.brand_role + competitive white-space in competitor_clusters.
field_derivation_notes.opportunity_priorities: LLM-synthesized. Source-tagged: each opportunity is attributed to the upstream artifact where the signal originated.
field_derivation_notes.risk_priorities: LLM-synthesized. Draws on market risk_flags (if present), competitor cluster strengths, and brand_positioning confidence_basis.
field_derivation_notes.moat_hypotheses: LLM-synthesized. Draws on brand_positioning.reason_to_believe + store_profile.value_proposition_hint + competitive white-space.
field_derivation_notes.messaging_priorities: LLM-synthesized. Draws on brand_positioning.messaging_pillars (if present) + audience segments + competitor weaknesses.
field_derivation_notes.offer_implications: LLM-synthesized. Draws on store_profile.assortment_shape + catalog_type + competitive gaps.
field_derivation_notes.gtm_implications: LLM-synthesized. Draws on market_intelligence.search_intents + positioning_goals + audience segments.
field_derivation_notes.validation_questions: LLM-synthesized. Surfaces key assumptions and unknown_states from all upstream artifacts.
field_derivation_notes.unknown_states: LLM carries forward explicitly flagged unknowns from market_intelligence.unknown_states, brand_positioning.confidence_basis, and any low-confidence upstream fields.

validation_errors.description: One or more of store_profile, market_intelligence, brand_positioning, competitor_clusters is absent from the pipeline.
LLM response could not be parsed as valid JSON object.
Parsed strategy_synthesis object fails inline validation: missing required fields, empty required arrays, or invalid enum values. Always runs in both cloud and self-hosted modes.

skipped: AJV schema validation (replaced by inline required-field and enum checks)
cloud_behavior.inline_output: strategy_synthesis object returned inline in pipeline. artifact_path is null.
cloud_behavior.inline_validation: Inline required-field and enum validation always runs in both modes.

secondary: build-pattern-manifest — uses positioning_focus to inform UX pattern selection
All SEO/AEO phases — informed by messaging_priorities and gtm_implications
